name: qualified_signups_launch_week
definition: Signups during launch week (T-0 through T+6) matching ICP filters (work email, company size, role) — deduped per company.
target_hint: Pre-revenue with <5k warm reach: 200–800. With 5–20k warm reach: 800–3,000. >20k reach: 3,000+. Quality > volume.

name: ph_rank_day_one
definition: Highest position achieved on Product Hunt's daily ranking on launch day (1 = top product of the day).
target_hint: Top 5 is strong for first-time launchers; Top 1 requires either a large existing crowd or a viral concept. Don't over-index — rank correlates weakly with revenue.

name: press_mentions_tier_1_2
definition: Count of articles in target tier-1 (TechCrunch, The Information, NYT, WSJ) and tier-2 (vertical newsletters, Substacks >10k subscribers) within 14 days of launch.
target_hint: 2–5 tier-2 mentions realistic without PR firm; 1 tier-1 mention is exceptional for first launch.

name: founder_social_reach_launch_window
definition: Sum of impressions on founder-authored launch posts across X and LinkedIn during the 7-day launch window.
target_hint: 100k+ for a founder with 5k engaged followers; 500k+ for 25k+ followers. <50k indicates content didn't resonate or posting cadence was wrong.

name: list_growth_launch_window
definition: Net new email subscribers added during the 7-day launch window divided by pre-launch list size.
target_hint: +25–60% is healthy for a focused launch; >100% usually means broad/non-ICP traffic that won't convert later.

name: activation_rate_24h
definition: Percent of launch-week signups that complete the core 'first value' event (e.g. first project created, first integration connected) within 24 hours.
target_hint: >40% healthy for self-serve SaaS. <25% indicates onboarding friction or that the launch attracted curious lurkers, not buyers.

name: free_to_paid_30d
definition: Percent of launch-window signups who become paying customers within 30 days.
target_hint: 3–8% for self-serve SaaS, 10–20% for high-intent vertical tools. <2% means pricing-fit or ICP mismatch.

name: earned_inbound_partnerships
definition: Count of inbound DMs/emails from potential partners, integrations, investors, or press during the launch month.
target_hint: 20–80 for a strong launch; clusters of integration requests usually signal a category fit.
